what_it_does: ai parse document is now available in the following regions: us west 2 us east 1 us east 2 ap northeast 1 ap northeast 2 ap south 1 ap southeast 1 ap southeast 2 ca central 1 eu central 1 eu west 1 eu west 2 sa east 1 See ai parse document function. Applies to: Databricks SQL Databricks Runtime The ai parse document() function leverages state of the art Databricks managed research techniques to parse structured content from unstructured documents. To prepare the output of ai parse document for search and retrieval use cases, use ai prep search function.
why_it_matters: ai parse document costs are recorded as part of the AI FUNCTIONS product.
